boss.name: AlchemistTheOG
boss.title: Bored Ape Retard
boss.taunt: MY JPEG IS STILL WORTH MILLIONS!

intro.t: ANYONE WHO BUYS BEAR COINS ARE RETARDS!
Says the ape about to eat a beam.
I minted a MILLION-dollar JPEG, kid!
Cool. It’s about to be a refund.
Diamond hands never fold!
Let’s pry them open, then.

boss.name: Dr. Robotnik
boss.title: Viceroy of Jeet Hell
taunts: SELL! SELL! WHY WON’T IT SELL?!

intro.t: BOBO WILL NEVER BREAK 5!! I MEAN... 7M!!!
It’s already past that. Cope.
GAH! IT KEEPS GOING UP!!!
That’s a green candle, doctor.
My charts are PERFECT! FLAWLESS!
Your charts are drawn in crayon.

boss.name: Mumina
boss.title: Queen of the Bulls
retorts: Long live the Queen… of losing.
Nice horns, shame about the aim.

intro.t: You dare storm my Kingdom, little bear?
Your Mumus started it. I’m finishing it.
I am Mumina, Queen of the Bulls! Kneel!
I don’t kneel — I’ve got a dad to save.
That old bear? He’s the LA Cabal’s prize!
Then get out of my way, your majesty.
Bloom and wither in my green storm!
Ethereum?! Gas fees, clogged mempools — normies BOUNCE! Woof!
And yet here you are, barking about it.
Solana onboards normies frictionlessly — sub-cent fees, REAL adoption!
Cool. Normies don’t care about your chain — they just bid.
BLASPHEMY! Pick a side, bear — ETH maxi or SOL maxi?!
Neither. Chains can coexist. Agnosticism is the future.
GRRR! Then taste my low-latency barrage!

boss.name: India Police
boss.title: The Corrupted Inspector
boss.taunt: RING RING! THE SCAM NEVER SLEEPS!
taunts: KINDLY DO THE NEEDFUL AND PERISH!
NICK LAND WOULD NEVER LEAVE ME!
boss.victory: Case closed. Vibe was right about you all along.

intro.t: STOP RIGHT THERE! Your creator Vibekilla is a criminal and you are lolicon contraband!
Sir, I am 30 years old. You simply do not understand anime.
IMPOSSIBLE! I have escalated your case to Interpol AND my supervisor!
You reported a cartoon bear-girl to Interpol. From a call center. Peak detective work.
My authority is ABSOLUTE! The Bobina Council trembles before me!
Your authority is a headset and a grudge. Vibe tried to warn you.
Do NOT utter his name!! ...and do NOT tell Nick Land about any of this.
Relax — your boyfriend already knows. Come out of the closet, bear-lover.
I am NOT a closeted bearsexual!! My power has shown me the TRUTH!
Your power rotted your brain. You should’ve trusted Vibe, not hunted the Council.
HE MADE ME DOUBT EVERYTHING! Now DO THE NEEDFUL — and DIE!
I’ll redeem his honor instead. Kindly log off, inspector.

boss.name: The Bogdanoffs
boss.title: Puppeteer Masters
taunts: The Records already wrote your fall.
We pull the strings, petit ours.
Generational wealth is not for the herd.
Igor. Grichka. It matters not which.
retorts: Sell signal on both of you.
boss.victory: Puppeteers cut loose. The Records were wrong about me.

intro.t: We felt you long ago, petit ours — your ascent rippling across the astral plane.
Two guys with the same haircut sensed me vibing. Should I be flattered or concerned?
We combed every shelf of the Akashic Records for the method to unmake you. We found it.
You read the universe’s entire library and the answer was “go fight a bear”? Peak intellect.
Understand the design, child: the herd CANNOT be trusted with generational wealth.
Free money breaks the weak. The cycle must be preserved — the rug is a MERCY.
A mercy? You rug degens on purpose and file it under charity?
Every normie who touches crypto must be gently returned to zero — rugged by some fellow running Claude on Pump.fun from a Lagos internet café. The natural order.
So the grand cosmic plan is… outsourcing rug pulls to an AI and a guy named Emeka. Cutting edge.
The Records are NEVER wrong. You fall, and balance is restored across every timeline.
Your records skipped a chapter. I don’t rug — I bolieve. Cut the strings, puppet-boys.
Then we shall deal your death by turns — Igor, or Grichka, you will never know which. DUMP IT.
Nobody gives a damn about your memes. Your precious “original characters.” Only MONEY is real.
Says the man who kidnapped a bear to flip him for profit.
Money is the root of all evil, child — and I tend that root. Vibe MADE you… but I could make you BETTER.
…Go on. I want to hear exactly how wrong you are.
Abandon the Council. Abandon your little friends. Take my hand, and I grant you power beyond the herd.
Hard pass, gramps.
The LA Cabal has run this racket for COUNTLESS cycles — siphoning wealth from the weak. The stupid. The gamblers.
And you think that makes you strong. It makes you a parasite.
The degenerates. The dregs of society! That is the ONLY game, and the house ALWAYS wins!
You really don’t get it. I believe in Dank Memes plus Time. I don’t just believe — I BOLIEVE.
Keep your cursed power. Go to Hell, James Wynn.
THEN BURN WITH THE REST OF THE DREGS!!
